subject: fix: review findings — async race, abort logic, escape propagation, tooltip snap
body:
- #1 (HIGH): Replace shared mutable failedMonths array with per-promise
  { commits, failed } return values collected after Promise.all resolves.
  Eliminates async mutation of shared array across parallel callbacks.

- #3 (MEDIUM): Use explicit timedOut flag to distinguish timeout abort
  from component unmount abort. Removes redundant controller.signal.aborted
  check inside AbortError catch block.

- #6 (LOW): Add e.stopPropagation() to useEscapeKey hook so only the
  topmost overlay closes when multiple are stacked (e.g., QuickGuide
  open over DetailPane).

- #8 (LOW): Round tooltip positions to integers via Math.round() to
  prevent subpixel rendering artifacts on non-Retina displays.

Tags: bug, a11y, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-fixes
Semver: patch
